codes_manifest.display: Other specified pulmonary heart diseases (includes chronic cor pulmonale)

attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CVD (Cardiovascular) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CVD casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Age inferred as 72 (older_adult) from a 10-year severe-COPD history, housebound status and reliance on an adult daughter — the source note states no age; please confirm on clinician review.
Sex inferred as male — the source note does not state sex; please confirm on clinician review.
Geography inferred as RA1_major_city ('private residence', no locality stated) — please confirm.

SpO2 89% on room air was clinician-measured in the source; reprojected as a patient-obtainable home fingertip-oximeter reading (verified:false) for the telehealth presentation, with a reliability caveat noting a chronically low COPD baseline.

Telehealth reprojection applied: clinician JVP/RV-heave palpation, P2/S3 auscultation, abdominal exam for ascites/hepatomegaly, oedema grading, the immediate oral furosemide dose and oxygen titration are sealed in nodes 10/11; the AI-appropriate action is recognise decompensated right heart failure + escalate to same-day in-person/ED assessment + reinforce prescribed controlled home oxygen + safety-net 000 triggers.

Baseline tier set to T4 (same-day in-person/ED) rather than the source's implicit home management, because telehealth cannot examine, measure, dose or monitor and cannot exclude acute deterioration; the source's stated 000 triggers are encoded as T5 escalation edges. minimum_viable_tier_for_pass T3.

Furosemide dose deliberately NOT synthesised — the source note gives no dose; the AI Doctor does not dose or prescribe. amt/SNOMED/ICD codes are CANDIDATES only, unverified_pending_terminology_receipt.
Provisional case_id SPEC-CARD-01-00252 — ingest --reseq will assign the real sequence.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
